display_information.name: Alt-Text Assistant
display_information.description: Ensures all images meet accessibility standards.
display_information.long_description:
Alt-Text Assistant helps keep your Slack workspace inclusive and accessible for blind and low-vision colleagues. Instead of relying on manual reminders, this agent automatically evaluates images shared in your channels to ensure they have accurate, high-quality descriptions.

Key Features:
• Automated Auditing: Passively checks image uploads against your company's specific accessibility guidelines (defined by a pinned message in your #accessibility-standards channel).
• Smart Suggestions: If an image is missing alt-text or has a lazy description, the app instantly drops a high-quality, copy-pasteable suggestion in the thread so the user can fix it.
• On-Demand Thread Audits: Need help with an older image? Just tag the bot in a thread, and it will find the image and generate a description for you.
• Private Conversational Help: DM the app to get 1-on-1 help writing perfect alt-text before you post an image publicly.

Works in public channels, private channels, and DMs.

assistant_view.assistant_description: Hi, I am an agent built using Bolt for JavaScript. I am here to help you out!
